name: Virtualex Holdings, Inc.
summary: Virtualex Holdings, Inc. provides consulting and outsourcing services in Japan and internationally. The company offers CRM solutions and services, including CRM consulting for sales process transformation, sales channel transformation, business process design and implementation, change management, and SFA and CRM system implementation; IT solutions for multi-channel CRM systems, DWH, BI solutions, EC systems, and reservation systems; and BPO solutions for non-face-to-face sales centers, customer centers, and back-office centers. It also provides BPO solutions and services comprising contact center BPO, data entry BPO, and application operation and maintenance/system operation and maintenance services. In addition, the company offers contact center solutions and services that include inspirX platform, an application in CRM that provides customer, marketing, and contents database functions for contact center operations; and contact center BPO service, which provides supports for contact center operation and its system operation with focus on customer contact point, as well as inspirX contact center application. Further, it provides marketing solutions and services, which comprise EC/mail order business consultation, system design, and business fulfillment services; and time to market (TTM) solutions and services, including TTM consulting, development, offshore system development, and BPO services. Additionally, the company offers BPM solutions and services, such as BPM consulting, system design, and business template applicable design services. The company was formerly known as Virtualex Consulting, Inc. and changed its name to Virtualex Holdings, Inc. in October 2017. The company was founded in 1999 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan. Virtualex Holdings, Inc. is a subsidiary of Simplex, Inc.
